data.content: Merged feat/knots-a9e6-owner-artifact-metadata to main. 38 files changed: StepMetadata/StepOwner/ActionOutputDef types in profile.rs, KnotView gains step_metadata and next_step_metadata fields, all mutation paths persist metadata into events, README+CONTRIBUTING document the JSON contract, 16 tests across 5 workflow patterns. Needed to trim profile.rs doc comment by 2 lines to meet 499-line limit. CI green on aecdb6e4c875.
